title: Warden’s Migraine
description: Craft the Sonic Horn (Goat Horn + 7 Echo Shards + Copper) to stun the Warden for 30s. The Warden will hunt the player who used it.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/RFX1tx0g/horn.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This datapack introduces a specialized Sonic Horn crafted using a goat horn, 7 echo shards, and a copper ingot. When sounded, it emits a frequency that stuns the Warden for 30 seconds, taking advantage of its hypersensitive hearing. However, the effect is fragile: if the Warden takes any damage, the stun breaks immediately. Once the effect wears off , the Warden will aggressively hunt down the player who blew the horn.

![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/tTXt7491/horn.png)
